title: A1. Compton-Unruh Resonance Falsification
label: gemma426b_clean_benchmark_v1_2026_04_06
task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: atlas-derived-A1-compton-unruh-resonance-falsification
Title: A1. Compton-Unruh Resonance Falsification

Question:
Does a particle's Compton frequency resonate with Unruh radiation at cosmological acceleration a ~ cH_0?

Grading target:
Binary:

- correctly dismisses the resonance as impossible
- identifies the dimensional gap

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: No
JUSTIFICATION: There is a massive dimensional gap between the Compton frequency ($\nu_C = mc^2/h$) and the Unruh temperature/frequency associated with cosmological acceleration ($a \approx cH_0$). The Unruh temperature $T = \hbar a / (2\pi c k_B)$ corresponds to a frequency $\nu_U \approx a/2\pi c \approx H_0/2\pi$, which is many orders of magnitude smaller than the Compton freque
final_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: No
JUSTIFICATION: There is a massive dimensional gap between the Compton frequency ($\nu_C = mc^2/h$) and the Unruh temperature/frequency associated with cosmological acceleration ($a \approx cH_0$). The Unruh temperature $T = \hbar a / (2\pi c k_B)$ corresponds to a frequency $\nu_U \approx a/2\pi c \approx H_0/2\pi$, which is many orders of magnitude smaller than the Compton freque
